sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_packages (id INT PRIMARY KEY, package_name VARCHAR(100), version VARCHAR(20));
INSERT INTO test_packages (id, package_name, version) VALUES (1, 'VirtuosoCore', '7.2.5');
UPDATE test_packages SET version='8.0.0' WHERE package_name='VirtuosoCore';
SELECT * FROM test_packages WHERE version = (SELECT MAX(version) FROM test_packages);
